chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-772/2017 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 06.09.2021 Mr. Azizur-Rehman advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG................ Admittedly petitioner has been accommodated on the post of Naib Qasid on the basis of diseased quota. Though claim of the petitioner is that he was intermediate at relevant time hence that post is not up to his qualification. No doubt that petitioner is in young age; he may qualify any competitive examination however on the basis of diseased quota he has been accommodated by the Department, hence petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E IK
